pi_items.source: Web search confirms European Travel Adapter is a real product category with typical market prices around €24.99
Web search for SKU 'EU-TRAVEL-ADAPT' returns no results - SKU appears to be synthetic/made-up for the task
Web search for 'European Travel Adapter 24.99 EUR price' found MrPRICE.online listing European Travel Adaptor at €24.49, confirming €24.99 is realistic market price
ISO 4217 standard - EUR is the official alphabetic code for Euro (numeric 978), confirmed via ISO 4217 specification
Web search confirms audio cables are real products in UK market; generic product type is realistic
Web search for SKU 'UK-AUDIO-CBL' returns no results - SKU appears to be synthetic/made-up for the task
Web search for 'British Audio Cable 12.99 GBP price' found Maplin Electronics listing 3.5mm Aux Stereo Cable at £12.99, and Hama.co.uk listing audio cables at 12.99 GBP, confirming price is realistic
ISO 4217 standard - GBP is the official alphabetic code for British Pound Sterling, confirmed via ISO 4217 specification
Both currencies are valid ISO 4217 codes; setup scripts reference store currency configuration at entity_id=1 with currencies_target_id matching these codes

Verified through: (1) seed_products.php creates Urban Electronics store with implicit ID 1, (2) setup_task.sh and export_result.sh reference 'entity_id=1' for store currencies, (3) Drupal default store is always ID 1

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Drupal Commerce store ID 1 (Urban Electronics) to support two additional ISO 4217 currencies: EUR (Euro) and GBP (British Pound Sterling). Two products must be created: 'European Travel Adapter' (priced at 24.99 EUR) and 'British Audio Cable' (priced at 12.99 GBP). Both product names and prices reflect realistic market values for these product types, though the specific SKUs (EU-TRAVEL-ADAPT and UK-AUDIO-CBL) are synthetic identifiers created for this task. The verifier checks exact price matches (24.99 and 12.99) and exact currency codes (EUR and GBP) against the Drupal database.
